title: drako's True V+
description: A modpack expanding minecraft in a semi vanilla friendly way.
body:
**Check out my current main project!**
- [Silver Edition](https://modrinth.com/modpack/silver-edition): A vanilla styled expansion for minecraft, expanded creativity, exploration and adventure, all with that Mojang feel. Spiritual successor to some of my old packs! **1.20.1 Forge**

## True V+
- A unique take on the classic vanilla+ mod pack.
- 200+ mods. Lightweight and focused on genuine, enhanced and expanded vanilla gameplay. A focus on creativity and QOL. No more massive overhauls, or combat focused gameplay. Just building and living.
- New vanilla style biomes, performance fixes, extended blocks and decorations, new slice of life gameplay elements, and many QOL/detail improvements.
